filters._comment: mode: 'include' = only send articles matching keywords. 'exclude' = skip matching articles. Set enabled:true to activate.

digest._comment: Daily digest bundles all daily articles into one message sent at sendAt time. Set enabled:true to activate. Individual article delivery is disabled while digest is on.

routing._comment: Optional: map source names to specific platform arrays. Leave empty object to broadcast all articles to all platforms.

scoring._comment: Article importance scoring 0.0–1.0. Only articles with score >= minScore are sent. Factors: source reputation, recency, keyword matches, description length.

severity._comment: Articles whose title matches any severity keyword get a 🚨 CRITICAL ALERT badge.

_addMoreSources: Run 'npm run add-source' to interactively add a new news source, OR manually add an entry to the 'sources' array above following the same format.
